title: LibWeb/CSS: Do not crash when parsing some multi-layer mask shorthands
task_prompt: Fix the crash triggered by Tests/LibWeb/Crash/CSS/mask-parsing-shorthand-multi-layer-mask-clip.html. Loading that page causes an abort/crash inside the CSS parser when parsing a multi-layer mask shorthand that specifies mask-clip with certain combinations of values. The page should load without crashing.
